item.title: Cloud Workflow Reference
item.description: Cloud Workflow Reference Summary This note is a lightweight reminder of the checks and workflow stages that often support small cloud deployments and operations work.

item.title: Cloud Identity, Service Principals, and Managed Identities
item.description: Cloud Identity, Service Principals, and Managed Identities Summary This note explains the difference between human identity, workload identity, and cloud-managed identity.

item.title: Terraform State, Backends, and Locking
item.description: Terraform State, Backends, and Locking Summary This note explains what Terraform state is, why backends matter, and why locking exists.

item.title: Cloud Concepts
item.description: Summary This section is for the mental models behind cloud work.

item.title: Cloud
item.description: Summary This section contains my cloud notes for AWS, Azure, infrastructure as code, and practical deployment learning.

item.title: Common Microsoft Admin Centres and When To Use Each
item.description: Common Microsoft Admin Centres and When To Use Each Summary This note explains which Microsoft admin centre is usually the right starting point for a given type of task.

item.title: License Assignment vs Group Membership vs App Access
item.description: License Assignment vs Group Membership vs App Access Summary This note separates three things that are easy to blend together in Microsoft support work: licence assignment, group membership, and actual app access.

item.title: Teams and SharePoint Support Basics
item.description: Teams and SharePoint Support Basics Summary This note is a basic workflow for first-pass Teams and SharePoint support.

item.title: Diagnostic Checks Reference
item.description: Diagnostic Checks Reference Summary This note is a quick reminder of common diagnostic checks that support troubleshooting across systems and services.

item.title: M365-endpoint
item.description: Microsoft 365 Joiner, Mover, Leaver and Endpoint Onboarding Lab Role Fit This project is best aligned with Microsoft 365, IT Support, and Modern Workplace roles.
